arts.sum: After several promising showings three seasons ago, talented 20-year-old Nico Paz disappeared from the map for Real Madrid, spending all of last season with Castilla. Since moving to Serie A though, Paz has gone from strength to strength with Como, earning a call-up to the Argentina squad in the process.
